words.zh: n. 事物, 東西, 物, 用品, 事, 事件, 情況, 行為, 特徵

words.def: the time after sunset and before sunrise while it is dark outside
words.zh: n. 夜, 夜晚, 晚上, 黑暗, 夜晚的工作

words.def: lose thickness; become thin or thinner
words.zh: a. 薄的, 細的, 瘦的, 稀疏的, 稀薄的, 淡的, 弱的, 空洞的

words.def: (baseball) a successful stroke in an athletic contest (especially in baseball)
words.zh: n. 打擊, 打, 衝撞, 諷刺
